name: get_org_hierarchy
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, max_depth INT
purpose: Return the organizational hierarchy rooted at a selected scope.
outputs: firms, divisions, regions, markets, branches, advisors

name: get_scope_descendants
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, entity_type STRING
purpose: Resolve authorized descendants for any hierarchy scope.
outputs: advisor_descendants, household_descendants, account_descendants

name: get_management_chain
purpose: Return DDW → RDW → MDW → Advisor management chain and requester context.
outputs: requester, ddw, rdw, mdw, advisor

name: get_revenue_summary_by_scope
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, period_type STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME
purpose: Aggregate revenue, AUM, NCF, NNM and entity counts for a hierarchy scope.
outputs: scope summary accumulator object

name: get_revenue_trend_by_scope
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, period_grain STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME
purpose: Return revenue trend grouped by graph time period.
outputs: revenue_trend grouped accumulator

name: get_product_mix_by_scope
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME
purpose: Return product-level revenue mix for a hierarchy scope.
outputs: total_revenue, product_mix, product hierarchy vertices

name: get_top_bottom_advisors
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME, direction STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Rank advisors by revenue within an authorized scope.
outputs: top_advisors or bottom_advisors with revenue

name: get_peer_benchmark
parameters: advisor_id STRING, peer_method STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME
purpose: Compare an advisor with market peers and embedding-based similar advisors.
outputs: advisor revenue, peer totals and peer details

name: get_advisor_360
purpose: Return a connected Advisor 360 view across business, CRM, AGP and AI artifacts.
outputs: all Advisor 360 connected sets

name: get_advisor_book_of_business
purpose: Return households, accounts and household revenue summary for an advisor.
outputs: advisor, households, accounts, household_revenue_summary

name: get_household_360
purpose: Return complete household context and AI artifacts.
outputs: household, accounts, CRM, AI and memory context

name: get_account_holdings_and_activity
purpose: Return holdings, activities, transactions and AI artifacts for an account.
outputs: account, holdings, activity, transactions and AI artifacts

name: get_agp_enrollment_summary
purpose: Return AGP enrollment, program, current progress and goal/KPI context.
outputs: advisor, enrollment, program, progress, milestones, goals, KPIs

name: get_agp_milestone_timeline
purpose: Return all eight AGP milestone progress records and KPI measurements.
outputs: enrollment, progress, milestones, measurements, KPIs

name: get_agp_kpi_measurements
purpose: Return KPI measurements for an AGP enrollment and optional milestone.
outputs: milestone progress, measurements and KPI definitions

name: get_agp_coaching_history
purpose: Return coaching sessions and manager reviews for an AGP advisor.
outputs: advisor, enrollment, coaching and review timelines

name: get_agp_crm_work_summary
purpose: Aggregate AGP advisor lead, referral and CRM opportunity work.
outputs: CRM work summary, pipeline and item sets

name: get_crm_leads
parameters: advisor_id STRING, status STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Return advisor CRM leads filtered by status and urgency.
outputs: advisor, leads, related households and CRM opportunities

name: get_crm_referrals
parameters: advisor_id STRING, status STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Return advisor CRM referrals filtered by status.
outputs: advisor, referrals, related households and CRM opportunities

name: get_crm_opportunities
parameters: advisor_id STRING, status STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Return advisor CRM opportunities with related clients, accounts and products.
outputs: opportunities with related household, account and product sets

name: get_crm_pipeline_by_stage
purpose: Aggregate CRM pipeline by sales stage.
outputs: pipeline_by_stage and opportunities

name: get_feature_snapshot
purpose: Return all versioned feature snapshots for an entity.
outputs: feature_snapshots

name: get_feature_lineage
purpose: Trace a feature snapshot to dependent predictions, opportunities, recommendations and reasoning.
outputs: feature snapshot ownership and downstream lineage

name: get_embeddings_for_entity
purpose: Return embedding metadata for an entity.
outputs: embeddings

name: get_similar_entities
parameters: entity_type STRING, entity_id STRING, result_limit INT, min_score DOUBLE
purpose: Return nearest-neighbor similarity records and target entities.
outputs: similarity matches and typed target sets

name: get_predictions
purpose: Return predictions with feature snapshots and reasoning evidence.
outputs: predictions, feature snapshots and reasoning

name: get_ai_opportunities
purpose: Return AI opportunities with prediction, CRM, feature and recommendation lineage.
outputs: opportunities and complete lineage

name: get_recommendations
purpose: Return recommendations and their complete supporting lineage.
outputs: recommendations and complete lineage

name: get_recommendation_detail
purpose: Return one recommendation with evidence, feedback and downstream learning.
outputs: one recommendation and full explainability/learning chain

name: get_feedback_learning_history
purpose: Return the recommendation feedback, outcome and learning lifecycle.
outputs: recommendation, feedback, outcomes and learning signals

name: get_context_for_agent
parameters: persona_user_id STRING, subject_id STRING, query_intent STRING
purpose: Build a persona-aware agent context bundle for an advisor subject.
outputs: persona authorization and ranked subject context sets

name: get_memory_timeline
purpose: Return active and historical memory for a subject.
outputs: memory timeline, source conversation and reasoning use

name: get_reasoning_trace
purpose: Return reasoning trace and direct evidence objects for an AI artifact.
outputs: reasoning records and direct graph evidence

name: get_graph_subgraph
parameters: root_type STRING, root_id STRING, max_depth INT, node_limit INT
purpose: Return a bounded business subgraph for Graph Explorer.
outputs: bounded typed subgraph sets

name: get_notifications_for_user
parameters: user_id STRING, status STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Return persona notifications ordered by severity and due date.
outputs: user and notifications

name: get_data_health_summary
purpose: Return vertex cardinalities and connected-edge traversal counts by type.
outputs: vertex counts and edge traversal counts

name: get_agent_execution_trace
purpose: Return agent execution, tool calls, evaluations, guardrails and reasoning.
outputs: agent execution trace and related operational artifacts

name: get_what_if_baseline
parameters: scenario_type STRING, scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING
purpose: Return stored what-if scenarios and current advisor baseline artifacts.
outputs: stored scenario plus current baseline artifacts

name: get_agp_program_cohort_summary
parameters: program_id STRING, cohort STRING, scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING
purpose: Aggregate AGP cohort enrollment and milestone status within an organizational scope.
outputs: cohort counts, milestone summary and member sets

name: get_insight_coaching_context
parameters: persona_user_id STRING, scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, subject_id STRING
purpose: Return the combined business and AI context used for insight/coaching cards.
outputs: user, subject and supporting insight/coaching context

name: get_recommendation_adoption_learning_summary
purpose: Aggregate recommendation adoption, impact and feedback learning for a scope.
outputs: adoption, feedback and learning aggregates with source sets

name: get_persona_scope_assignments
purpose: Return all explicit persona scope assignments and management relationships.
outputs: user scopes and management assignments

name: get_data_quality_issues
parameters: domain STRING, severity STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Detect missing mandatory graph relationships for core domains.
outputs: issue count and typed issue vertex sets

name: get_learning_weights
purpose: RL/bandit learning weights (StateRepository).
outputs: learning_weight vertices

name: get_impact_ledger
purpose: Impact-ledger entries by traversal (StateRepository).
outputs: impact_ledger vertices

name: get_rec_status_transitions
purpose: Recommendation status-transition audit trail by traversal.
outputs: rec_status_transition vertices

name: get_context_memory_by_scope
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, memory_type STRING, result_limit INT
purpose: Context memory by graph traversal of memory_for_<scope> edges.
outputs: context_memory vertices

name: advisor_reasoning_traversal
purpose: Graph relational reasoning traversal.
outputs: traversal path + entities

name: scope_reasoning_traversal
purpose: Graph relational reasoning traversal.
outputs: traversal path + entities

name: get_reasoning_traces_for_scope
purpose: Graph relational reasoning traversal.
outputs: traversal path + entities

name: get_scope_transactions
parameters: scope_type STRING, scope_id STRING, start_date DATETIME, end_date DATETIME
purpose: Raw revenue-transaction rows for a scope with advisor/product/household context (revenue analytics, trend explorer, dashboard readers).
outputs: transactions vertex set: advisor_id, advisor_name, transaction_date, revenue_amount, transaction_type, product_id, product_name, household_id, household_name

name: get_product_category_map
purpose: Product -> subcategory -> business-line category mapping for transaction classification.
outputs: products vertex set: product_name, subcategory_id, subcategory_name, category_id, category_name

name: get_scope_advisor_placements
purpose: Full ancestor placement (branch+state/market/region/division/firm ids and names) for every advisor in a scope.
outputs: advisor_placements vertex set: advisor_name, branch_id, branch_name, branch_state, market_id, market_name, region_id, region_name, division_id, division_name, firm_id, firm_name

name: get_embeddings_by_type
purpose: All persisted embedding vertices for one entity type (ADVISOR/HOUSEHOLD/ACCOUNT) plus that type's display vertices, for live cosine similar-entities computation (GQ-024 is per-entity; GQ-025 uses precomputed matches).
outputs: embeddings vertex set (entity_type, entity_id, vector_preview, dimensions, model_name, generated_at); households / accounts / advisors display vertex sets (exactly one non-empty per call)

name: get_agp_kpi_scorecard
purpose: Flat per-measurement KPI scorecard rows for one advisor's AGP enrollment — each measurement joined to its KPI (measurement_for_kpi) and milestone month (progress_for_milestone); GQ-014/015 print these as disjoint sets with no pairing.
outputs: kpi_measurement_rows vertex set: kpi_id, kpi_name, unit, direction, milestone_month, target_value, actual_value, attainment_pct, status, measured_at

name: get_memory_counts_by_type
purpose: Global count of phx_dm_context_memory vertices grouped by memory_type across ALL scopes (StateRepository memory-coverage read; GQ-047 is per-scope, GQ-036 counts whole vertex types only).
outputs: memory_counts MapAccum: memory_type -> count

name: get_coaching_tasks
purpose: Manager-assigned coaching tasks for an advisor plus assigning persona users (no prior query touches phx_dm_coaching_task; pairing recoverable via task.created_by_user_id).
outputs: tasks (phx_dm_coaching_task) and assigners (phx_dm_persona_user) vertex sets

name: get_documents
purpose: Bounded listing of phx_dm_document vertices for global search title matching (no existing query lists documents).
outputs: documents vertex set: document_id, title, document_type, source, version, status, published_date

name: get_playbooks
purpose: Full playbook listing for recommendation generation (existing queries reach playbooks only as lineage of persisted recommendations, unusable at generation time).
outputs: playbooks vertex set: playbook_id, playbook_name, category, version, status, summary

name: get_recommendation_advisor
purpose: The advisor a recommendation belongs to (rec->advisor hop via phx_dm_recommendation_for_advisor); GQ-029 excludes the advisor and the rec vertex has no advisor attribute.
outputs: advisor vertex set (phx_dm_advisor)

name: get_recommendation_status_counts
purpose: Per-status counts across ALL phx_dm_recommendation vertices including household-level REC_HH_* (GQ-041 scope=ALL reaches advisor-attached recs only — verified undercount).
outputs: status_counts MapAccum: status -> count

name: get_coaching_task
purpose: Single coaching task by id — read-before-write for task status updates (no other query reads phx_dm_coaching_task by task_id).
outputs: task vertex set (phx_dm_coaching_task)
